name: add-asset-groups-to-assets
summary: Associate a list of existing asset groups with selected assets.

name: add-assets-to-asset-group
summary: Add specified assets to an existing asset group for organization.

name: asset-add-dependency
summary: Manually inject a missing dependency component into an asset's inventory.

name: asset-modify-dependency
summary: Update metadata or details for a manually added asset dependency.

name: asset-remove-dependencies
summary: Remove specific dependencies from the component list of an asset.

name: asset-submit
summary: Upload firmware or SBOMs with metadata, group assignments, and CPEs.

name: asset-update
summary: Modify metadata such as name, vendor, or version for assets.

name: create-asset-comparison-report
summary: Create a new comparison report to diff vulnerabilities and components between two assets.

name: create-asset-group
summary: Create a new named group to organize and track assets.

name: create-notification-configuration
summary: Create a notification configuration defining channel, scopes, and triggers for alerts.

name: delete-asset-comparison-report
summary: Permanently delete an asset comparison report by its ID.

name: delete-asset-group
summary: Permanently remove an asset group while keeping contained assets intact.

name: delete-notification-configuration
summary: Permanently delete a notification configuration by its ID.

name: notify-notification-configuration
summary: Send a test notification using an existing notification configuration.

name: remediate-all-asset-vulnerabilities
summary: Apply a remediation status to all vulnerabilities matching specific filters.

name: remediate-asset-vulnerabilities
summary: Bulk apply VEX remediation status to multiple vulnerabilities on assets.

name: remediate-asset-vulnerability
summary: Update remediation status and justification for a single asset vulnerability.

name: remediate-certificates
summary: Update remediation status and notes for certificate issues found in assets.

name: remediate-license-issues
summary: Update status and add notes to resolve identified license issues.

name: remediate-private-keys
summary: Apply remediation status to private key exposures discovered in assets.

name: remediate-public-keys
summary: Update remediation status for public key issues identified in assets.

name: remediate-secrets
summary: Apply remediation status and justification to exposed secrets in assets.

name: remove-all-asset-groups-from-assets
summary: Disassociate all asset groups from a specified list of assets.

name: remove-assets-from-asset-group
summary: Remove selected assets from a specific asset group container configuration.

name: set-asset-groups-to-asset
summary: Replace all current group associations for an asset with new ones.

name: set-assets-to-asset-group
summary: Overwrite the member list of an asset group with new assets.

name: submit-rise-ai-analysis
summary: Request a RISE AI analysis for an eligible asset to generate insights.

name: update-asset-group
summary: Rename or update the description of an existing asset group.

name: update-notification-configuration
summary: Update channel, scopes, triggers, or status for an existing notification configuration.

name: update-org-level-settings
summary: Configure global organization settings such as idle session timeout duration.

name: user-action
summary: Perform administrative actions like enabling or disabling specific user accounts.

name: user-delete
summary: Permanently delete a user account and remove their access rights.

name: user-invite
summary: Invite a new user to the organization with a specific role.

name: user-remove
summary: Remove a user from the organization without deleting their account.

name: user-reset-password
summary: Trigger a password reset email for a specific user account.

name: user-set-user-role
summary: Assign a new permission role like Owner or Operator to users.

name: user-update-user
summary: Modify user profile information including name and contact email details.

name: activity
summary: Retrieve a comprehensive log of actions and events for assets.

name: analytics
summary: Access high-level risk data and charts for organization dashboards.

name: asset
summary: Retrieve detailed metadata and risk information for a single asset.

name: asset-group-analytics
summary: View risk metrics and exploit counts for a specific group.

name: asset-group-members
summary: List all assets associated with a specific asset group container.

name: asset-groups
summary: Retrieve a detailed paginated list of all asset groups available.

name: asset-status
summary: Check if an asset is currently processing or has finished.

name: asset-upload
summary: Obtain a secure pre-signed URL to upload files for analysis.

name: asset-vulnerability-remediation
summary: Retrieve current VEX status and justification for a specific vulnerability.

name: assets-overview
summary: View high-level risk and threat exposure metrics for multiple assets.

name: assets-relay
summary: Retrieve a paginated, sortable list of assets with filtering options.

name: assets-relay-lite
summary: Retrieve assets with trimmed fields — keeps identity, status, risk score, and analytic rollups; drops filesystems, SHA-256, exploit trees, and credential counts.

name: assets-relay-summary
summary: Retrieve minimal asset data — ID, name, and analytic counts only — for fast org-wide sweeps to decide which assets need deeper queries.

name: binary-protections
summary: List security hardening details for binaries found within the asset.

name: binary-protections-summary
summary: Get aggregated counts of binary hardening features like NX or PIE.

name: caas-availability
summary: Check for the availability of the RISE AI analysis report.

name: certificate-external-filters
summary: Retrieve available filter options for certificate queries.

name: certificates
summary: List X.509 certificates and validity status found in the asset.

name: credentials
summary: Identify user accounts and password hashes discovered within the filesystem.

name: dependencies
summary: List all software components and libraries identified in the asset.

name: dependencies-lite
summary: List dependencies with trimmed fields — keeps identity, version, license, purls, and analytic rollups; drops file metadata, digests, and nested correlation details.

name: dependency-known-exploits
summary: Check if specific dependencies are linked to known public exploits.

name: detailed-vulnerabilities
summary: Retrieve in-depth vulnerability data including descriptions and CVSS vector strings.

name: detailed-vulnerabilities-lite
summary: Retrieve vulnerability descriptions with preferred CVSS v3.1 scores only — drops full v2/v4 impact blocks, exploit timelines, references, and problem type details.

name: download-extracted-firmware
summary: Generate a URL to download the full unpacked file system.

name: download-file
summary: Create a secure link to download a specific individual file.

name: download-file-list
summary: Generate a URL to download a list of all files.

name: download-firmware
summary: Generate a link to download the original uploaded firmware image.

name: get-ai-model-data
summary: Retrieve configuration and metadata for a specific AI model integration.

name: get-asset-comparison-report
summary: Retrieve a completed asset comparison report including vulnerability, component, and summary diffs.

name: get-certificate-reachability
summary: Determine whether discovered certificates are reachable via executable scripts or system paths.

name: get-dependency-reachability
summary: Determine whether a dependency is reachable via executable scripts or system paths.

name: get-secret-reachability
summary: Determine whether discovered secrets are reachable via executable scripts or system paths.

name: get-vuln-reachability
summary: Determine if a vulnerability can be executed via system paths.

name: grouped-dependencies
summary: View dependencies aggregated by vendor, license, or specific component type.

name: hashes
summary: List cryptographic hashes for files identified within the asset filesystem.

name: identified-components-preview
summary: Return organization-wide component counts filtered by enabled identification methods, with before/after deltas when verification settings change.

name: license
summary: Retrieve detailed information for a specific software license.

name: license-issue
summary: Get details about a specific license compliance issue.

name: license-issues
summary: List license compliance issues identified across asset components.

name: license-issues-external-filters
summary: Retrieve available filter options for license issue queries.

name: licenses-spdx-ids
summary: List available SPDX license identifiers for filtering and reference.

name: list-ai-providers
summary: List available AI provider integrations and their current status.

name: list-asset-comparison-reports
summary: List all asset comparison reports with pagination, filtering, and sorting.

name: list-asset-correlations
summary: Retrieve cross-asset correlation data linking shared components and vulnerabilities.

name: list-asset-crypto-libraries
summary: List cryptographic libraries and algorithms detected within an asset.

name: list-notification-configurations
summary: List all notification configurations with their channels, scopes, and triggers.

name: list-notification-logs
summary: Retrieve a paginated log of notification delivery events and their statuses.

name: match-vulnerabilities
summary: Find specific vulnerabilities matching a provided component identifier or package.

name: metrics
summary: View organization-wide statistics on asset counts, processing, and risk.

name: misconfigurations
summary: List failed security checks and configuration risks found in assets.

name: misconfigurations-lite
summary: List misconfigurations with trimmed fields — keeps check ID, name, severity, result, and correlation count; drops nested correlation objects.

name: org-level-information
summary: Retrieve organization-level metadata such as last-updated time, optionally scoped by asset groups.

name: org-level-settings
summary: Check how the tenant organization is configured.

name: package-dependencies-by-id
summary: View the dependency tree hierarchy for a specific software package.

name: private-key-external-filters
summary: Retrieve available filter options for private key queries.

name: private-keys
summary: Detect private cryptographic keys stored insecurely on the asset filesystem.

name: public-key-external-filters
summary: Retrieve available filter options for public key queries.

name: public-keys
summary: List public cryptographic keys found within the asset's file system.

name: rise-ai-analysis-data
summary: Check for the contents of the RISE AI analysis report.

name: rise-ai-availability
summary: Check eligibility and status of RISE AI analysis for an asset.

name: search
summary: Execute keyword searches across all artifacts and files in organization.

name: secret
summary: Retrieve detailed information about a specific discovered secret.

name: secret-categories-summary
summary: Get aggregated counts of secrets grouped by category type.

name: secret-status-count
summary: Retrieve counts of secrets grouped by remediation status.

name: secret-types-and-count
summary: List secret types discovered with their occurrence counts.

name: secrets
summary: List all secrets and sensitive data discovered within an asset.

name: secrets-summary
summary: Get a high-level overview of secret findings and exposure metrics.

name: sift
summary: Perform fuzzy hash matching to find similar code or files.

name: user-orgs
summary: List all organizations the current user is authorized to access.

name: users
summary: Retrieve a detailed list of all users and their assigned roles.

name: vulnerabilities
summary: List CVEs and associated risks for components in an asset.

name: vulnerabilities-lite
summary: List vulnerabilities with trimmed fields — keeps CVE, severity, CVSS/EPSS scores, fix versions, and correlation count; drops nested correlations and remediation details.

name: vulnerabilities-overview
summary: Get a summary of vulnerability counts and severity across assets.

name: vulnerability
summary: Retrieve detailed metadata, scores, and descriptions for a specific vulnerability.

name: vulnerability-external-filters
summary: Count vulnerabilities matching external threat feeds like CISA or botnets.

name: vulnerability-lite
summary: Retrieve a single vulnerability with preferred CVSS v3.1 score only — drops full v2/v4 impact blocks, exploit references, and problem type details.
